SEARCH
Package cpdt.simulator.scenarios

Class Scenario

java.lang.Object
cpdt.simulator.scenarios.Scenario
Direct Known Subclasses:
EquipmentFailureScenario, FireScenario, GasLeakScenario, OverheatScenario, OverpressureScenario
public abstract class Scenario extends Object
Base abstraction for all simulation scenarios.

Provides the common state and lifecycle operations shared by all simulation scenarios, including scenario identification, affected process area, activation state, and access to the plant environment. Concrete implementations define how specific process conditions are introduced, updated, and resolved within the simulation.

This class follows the Template Method design pattern by defining a common scenario lifecycle while allowing subclasses to implement specialized simulation behavior.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Lakshmi Sanjeev

  • Field Details

    • plantEnvironment

      protected final PlantEnvironment plantEnvironment

  • Constructor Details

    • Scenario

      protected Scenario(String scenarioId, String name, ProcessArea affectedArea, PlantEnvironment plantEnvironment)
      Constructs a simulation scenario.

      Initializes the common metadata and shared plant environment required for a simulation scenario.

      Parameters:
      scenarioId - unique identifier for the scenario
      name - human-readable name of the scenario
      affectedArea - process area affected by the scenario
      plantEnvironment - simulated plant environment to be modified
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null

  • Method Details

    • activate

      public abstract void activate()
      Activates the scenario.

      Implementations should apply the initial environmental or device changes required to begin the simulation event.

    • deactivate

      public abstract void deactivate()
      Deactivates the scenario.

      Implementations should initiate restoration of the affected environment or device state back toward normal operating conditions.

    • update

      public abstract void update(long deltaTimeMs)
      Updates the scenario state.

      Called periodically by the simulation engine to advance the scenario over time and apply incremental changes to the simulated environment.

      Parameters:
      deltaTimeMs - elapsed time since the previous update, in milliseconds

    • setActive

      public void setActive(boolean active)
      Sets the activation state of the scenario.
      Parameters:
      active - true to activate the scenario state; false otherwise

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Indication for the activation state of the scenario.

    • isFullyResolved

      public boolean isFullyResolved()
      Indicates whether the scenario has completely returned to its normal operating state.
      Returns:
      true if the scenario has been fully resolved; false otherwise
